title: Magic & Flight
description: A NeoForge modpack focusing on great MAGIC mods and CREATE AERONAUTICS! This pack is intended for a private server!
body:
_***This modpack is intended to help members of a private server to stay up-to-date!***_

Who doesn't love **MAGIC** and **FLYING** things? Seems to me like a match made in heaven! With a heavy sprinkle of things to find around the world, this pack is made for the adventurers!

**DIVE** into a sea breaming with life thanks to **Hybrid Aquatic**!

**CAST** the most arcane, colorful and demonic spells using the numerous magical mods packed in!

**CREATE** flying contraptions only bound by your imagination (and gravity) from the **Create Aeronautics** mod!

**TRAVEL** the world and visit over 200 structures and points of interest generated throughout the world!

**FIGHT** and befriend many new and magical creatures that exist outside of vanilla Minecraft, and even our dimension!

**VISIT** exotic and new dimensions molded by mods like **Dungeons Dimensions: Nether**, **BetterEnd**, and **Pastel**!

**FOCUS** on enjoying yourself thanks to **MANY** great quality of life mods!

***This pack will most likely always be (NeoForge) Minecraft 1.21.1 as it is the latest (and only) version of Minecraft the Create Aeronautics supports!***
